steps.description: The student unplugs the computer power supply and HDMI cable.
The student places the computer on the table.
The student opens the computer tower.
The student inspects the computer tower.
The student removes the first graphic card.
The student removes the second graphic card.
The student inserts the graphics cards.
The student inserts the graphic cards.
The student closes the computer tower.
The student places the tower in the computer furniture.
The student plugs in the HDMI cable and the power supply.
